title: Easycook Microwave Sauce Pan, Clear, 500ml, Poly-carbonate Finish, Microwave Safe, Durable, Stylish, Includes Sauce Pan and Lid
features: Perfect for Microwave Heating: Ideal for warming soups, beans, vegetables, and more – designed for safe use in all standard microwave ovens (not suitable for conventional hobs or grills).
Durable & BPA-Free: Made from tough, polycarbonate plastic that resists cracking and breaking – completely BPA-free for safe, everyday use.
Stain-Resistant Surface: High-quality polycarbonate construction resists staining from sauces and food, keeping your saucepan looking clear and fresh after repeated use.
Compact & Convenient: 500ml capacity with a clear lid to minimize splatter. Easy to monitor cooking progress without removing the lid.
Easy to Clean: Dishwasher-safe material makes cleanup simple and quick – ideal for busy kitchens and everyday use.
description: From the manufacturer Top view in packaging Non Staining Microwave sauce pan and lid BPA SAFE Made in the UK Duel pouring lips allows left or right handed pouring Side view in packaging 600 ml, also comes in 900 ml also available in Red pan with peas Ideal for warming Milk, soups, drinks, beans , saauces, porridge and many more pan with beans Easy to use, easy to clean Microwave safe Dish washer safe Made in the UK BPA SAFE
